TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Liwkiw binacadan (Liwkiw a kamu:Liwkiw binacadan/„Éę„Éľ„ÉĀ„É•„Éľ „Éü„É≥„āļ„āĮ RŇęchŇę minzuku?ÔľõDipun:Liwkiw binacadanÔľŹ„āä„āÖ„ĀÜ„Āć„āÖ„ĀÜ„ĀŅ„āď„Āě„ĀŹ RyŇękyŇę minzoku?)u Liwkiw subal a binacadan, sakacaay kanikalecadan nu kaudipan a kitidaan "Ukinawa, Sindaw subalan atu Yinmin subalan" nika kenih han, pala Ukinawa a tademaw han, Sindaw a tademaw atu Yinmin a tademaw, nu aydaay nu Dipun tu satabakiay a binacadan, ihakalay a tademaw saan tu Ukinawa ku nuheni han RŇęchŇę minzuku?Ôľõśó•Ť™ě:ÁźČÁźÉśįĎśóŹÔľŹ„āä„āÖ„ĀÜ„Āć„āÖ„ĀÜ„ĀŅ„āď„Āě„ĀŹ RyŇękyŇę minzoku?) . Liwkiw cundaw naw misitekeday a kanatal, kanen nu Dipun sisa mala Dipun ku nuheni, nu micidek tu nilecuhan nida a tademaw "Ukinawa a tademaw", " Sindaw a tademaw", "yenmin a tademaw", itini i imiyan caay kaw malecaday ku idang atu lalangawan nu cudad a "Liwkiw binacadan" , u cacay han musakamu tu kitidaan, duma han musakamu tu lalangawan, caay kaw malecaday kina tusaay. sisa, ayda ni kinsaan nu Dipun sa, inaya ku "Liwkiw a tademaw" atu " Liwkiw binacadan " nipipulungan amisausi, pulung han amisausi u Dipun a binacadan, duma satu, i Ukinawaay a Dipung yadah ku tidaay, muenengay i tidaay a tademaw caay kaw nakamuwan u "Liwkiw a tademaw" atu " Liwkiw a binacadan", sisa, aydaay a kawaw nai' ku tada malucekay atu misausi. ś≠§Ś§Ė, . itini likisi nakamuwan a Liwkiw binacadah tatengaay nika kenihan itini i Liwkiw cundaw (pulung nu aydaay a Ukinawa atu Luedaw nu Yenmin cundaw), idaw ku muenengay i Dipu a maudip, Taywan cundaw atu i nutawan a kanatalan mueneng. . Liwkiw binacadan tada kamu u Liwkiw a nakamuan, ayda nu Liwkiw a binacadan maliyuh tu musakamu tunu Liwki a kamuan, ayda kapulungan musakamu han u Dipun a kamuan atu Ukinawa nu Dipun a nakamuan. Liwkiw a tademaw u caaya kaww masasengiay nu nakamuan, pasu Yemin a kamu, Ukinawa a kamu, aydaay a Kuyzen a kamu, Pacun-san a kamu, Kunku a kamu, atu Nakuo a kamu. . papulung han u Liwkiw a kumuan han, milecad tu Dipun a kamuan. . Liwkiw a kamu maca cinglaw henay ayda, situngusa a misulitay san u Aetay a nakamuan, pasilusi patideng tu "Dipun a kamuan" pulung han, nika mikinkiway tina kamuan a tademaw idaw ku sasakamuen nuheni, saan Liwkiw a kamu atu Nandaw a kamu misengi micapi tu nakamuan nuheni. . yadah ku na kamuan nu Liwkiw, u Ukinawa ku tatelungan nu malucekay a kamuan, nakamuan nuheni idaw ku caaya pilecad nu nakamuan, saka caay kalecad nu nakamuan, a caay tu ka sasukumu ku nuheni. ayda nu Ukinawaay a tademaw anu u kapulunga a kitidaan u tada Dipun ku kamu nuhani, Ukinawaay a tademaw yu masasakamu satu pihaceng ku ngalngal nu Ukinawaay a musakamu tu nu Dipun a kamuan " Ukinawa kamu" ayda musakamuay tu Ukinawa a nakamuan makaala tu malebu ku matinengay musakamu, u babalakisa ku matinengay, sisa hamaw sa a malawpes kina kamu nu Ukinawa, tada musakamuay nu Pacunsayi atu Nakuoyi micidek ku adidai nu matinengay mu sakamu, ka balihenawan sa alaw a kalawpesan kina kamuan Liwkiw cundaw i laad nu Cunkuo talu atu Dipun, Liwkiw kalalidan nu Cunkuo lalangawan atu Dipun a lalangawan, mala micidekay nu lalangawan. . picidekan nu Liwkiw a lalangaw ÁźČÁźÉÁČĻśúČÁöĄśĖáŚĆĖ lunem nu Liwkiw a tademaw ÁźČÁźÉšļļÁöĄťĺúÁĒ≤ŚĘď itini i Liwkiw yadah ku milecaday tu Cuokuw atu Dipun a lalangawan. sakamusa, pikanan nu picidekan nu Liwkiw a "Ukinawa a liwli" sa, atu epahepahan nipipacikahan nu kakanen, itini i Cuokuo atu Dipun inai'. lunem nu Ukinawa mailay tu tulu nu mahicaay anitademan nu waywayan, u bilangaay a luneman, puohun a luneman atu masalumaay a luneman. lunem nu masa bilangaaay ka picidekan han i Cunkuo nutipan a Ce'-cin, Hu-cin, Kuen-tun, Puohu lunem han nu picidekan a lineman. itini i kitakid satabakiay nu Liwkiw wanciw a Puohun luneman. sumamad idaw ku huncen hananay a lisi nipitademan. mapatay satu ku tademaw, itidan nuheni ku kidu i buhang pakunida han milahul, katukuh tu tuluay a mihcaan tayda ku tataynaan a lalumaan misapud tu ukak mibanaw misulac kya tadem han tu. tawyaay idaw ku Cunkuo nutipanay a ngayngayan nu tademaw anipisapuden ku ukak mitadem, tidaay a tademaw pangangan han tu " mibanaw tu ukak" anipitadem han, idaw ku hulic aydaay nu Dipun nipatucekan, idaw ku tatuduhan tu tademaw i Ukinawa lapesen tu, nutaw a subalan idaw henay ku tademen ku ukakay, nai' tu ku huncen hananay caay tu kaadih malawpes tu. .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan (r~…ĺiwkiw a kamu:r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan/***** **** ** ¶ńß* minzuku?*dipun:r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan*********** *j*kj* minzoku?)u r~…ĺiwkiw subar~…ĺ a bina ¶adan, saka ¶aaj kanikar~…ĺ…ô ¶adan nu kaudipan a kitidaan "ukinawa, sindaw subar~…ĺan atu jinmin subar~…ĺan" nika k…ônińß ńßan, par~…ĺa ukinawa a tad…ômaw ńßan, sindaw a tad…ômaw atu jinmin a tad…ômaw, nu ajdaaj nu dipun tu satabakiaj a bina ¶adan, ińßakar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw saan tu ukinawa ku nuńß…ôni ńßan ** ¶ńß* minzuku?***:*************** *j*kj* minzoku?) . r~…ĺiwkiw ¶undaw naw misit…ôk…ôdaj a kanatar~…ĺ, kan…ôn nu dipun sisa mar~…ĺa dipun ku nuńß…ôni, nu mi ¶id…ôk tu nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nida a tad…ômaw "ukinawa a tad…ômaw", " sindaw a tad…ômaw", "j…ônmin a tad…ômaw", itini i imijan ¶aaj kaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ku idaŇč atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu ¶udad a "r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan" , u ¶a ¶aj ńßan musakamu tu kitidaan, duma ńßan musakamu tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, ¶aaj kaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj kina tusaaj. sisa, ajda ni kinsaan nu dipun sa, inaja ku "r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw" atu " r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan " nipipur~…ĺuŇčan amisausi, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan amisausi u dipun a bina ¶adan, duma satu, i ukinawaaj a dipuŇč jadańß ku tidaaj, mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i tidaaj a tad…ômaw ¶aaj kaw nakamuwan u "r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw" atu " r~…ĺiwkiw a bina ¶adan", sisa, ajdaaj a kawaw nai Ē~ ° ku tada mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj atu misausi. **, . itini r~…ĺikisi nakamuwan a r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adańß tat…ôŇčaaj nika k…ônińßan itini i r~…ĺiwkiw ¶undaw (pur~…ĺuŇč nu ajdaaj a ukinawa atu r~…ĺu…ôdaw nu j…ônmin ¶undaw), idaw ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i dipu a maudip, tajwan ¶undaw atu i nutawan a kanatar~…ĺan mu…ôn…ôŇč. . r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan tada kamu u r~…ĺiwkiw a nakamuan, ajda nu r~…ĺiwkiw a bina ¶adan mar~…ĺijuńß tu musakamu tunu r~…ĺiwki a kamuan, ajda kapur~…ĺuŇčan musakamu ńßan u dipun a kamuan atu ukinawa nu dipun a nakamuan. r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw u ¶aaja kaww masas…ôŇčiaj nu nakamuan, pasu j…ômin a kamu, ukinawa a kamu, ajdaaj a kujz…ôn a kamu, pa ¶un-san a kamu, kunku a kamu, atu nakuo a kamu. . papur~…ĺuŇč ńßan u r~…ĺiwkiw a kumuan ńßan, mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu dipun a kamuan. . r~…ĺiwkiw a kamu ma ¶a ¶iŇčr~…ĺaw ńß…ônaj ajda, situŇčusa a misur~…ĺitaj san u a…ôtaj a nakamuan, pasir~…ĺusi patid…ôŇč tu "dipun a kamuan" pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan, nika mikinkiwaj tina kamuan a tad…ômaw idaw ku sasakamu…ôn nuńß…ôni, saan r~…ĺiwkiw a kamu atu nandaw a kamu mis…ôŇči mi ¶api tu nakamuan nuńß…ôni. . jadańß ku na kamuan nu r~…ĺiwkiw, u ukinawa ku tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj a kamuan, nakamuan nuńß…ôni idaw ku ¶aaja pir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu nakamuan, saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu nakamuan, a ¶aaj tu ka sasukumu ku nuńß…ôni. ajda nu ukinawaaj a tad…ômaw anu u kapur~…ĺuŇča a kitidaan u tada dipun ku kamu nuńßani, ukinawaaj a tad…ômaw ju masasakamu satu pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ nu ukinawaaj a musakamu tu nu dipun a kamuan " ukinawa kamu" ajda musakamuaj tu ukinawa a nakamuan makaar~…ĺa tu mar~…ĺ…ôbu ku matin…ôŇčaj musakamu, u babar~…ĺakisa ku matin…ôŇčaj, sisa ńßamaw sa a mar~…ĺawp…ôs kina kamu nu ukinawa, tada musakamuaj nu pa ¶unsaji atu nakuoji mi ¶id…ôk ku adidai nu matin…ôŇčaj mu sakamu, ka bar~…ĺińß…ônawan sa ar~…ĺaw a kar~…ĺawp…ôsan kina kamuan r~…ĺiwkiw ¶undaw i r~…ĺaad nu ¶unkuo tar~…ĺu atu dipun, r~…ĺiwkiw kar~…ĺar~…ĺidan nu ¶unkuo r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu dipun a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, mar~…ĺa mi ¶id…ôkaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. . pi ¶id…ôkan nu r~…ĺiwkiw a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw ******* r~…ĺun…ôm nu r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw ******* itini i r~…ĺiwkiw jadańß ku mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu ¶uokuw atu dipun a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. sakamusa, pikanan nu pi ¶id…ôkan nu r~…ĺiwkiw a "ukinawa a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺi" sa, atu …ôpańß…ôpańßan nipipa ¶ikańßan nu kakan…ôn, itini i ¶uokuo atu dipun inai Ē~ °. r~…ĺun…ôm nu ukinawa mair~…ĺaj tu tur~…ĺu nu mańßi ¶aaj anitad…ôman nu wajwajan, u bir~…ĺaŇčaaj a r~…ĺun…ôman, puońßun a r~…ĺun…ôman atu masar~…ĺumaaj a r~…ĺun…ôman. r~…ĺun…ôm nu masa bir~…ĺaŇčaaaj ka pi ¶id…ôkan ńßan i ¶unkuo nutipan a ¶…ô Ē~ °- ¶in, ńßu- ¶in, ku…ôn-tun, puońßu r~…ĺun…ôm ńßan nu pi ¶id…ôkan a r~…ĺin…ôman. itini i kitakid satabakiaj nu r~…ĺiwkiw wan ¶iw a puońßun r~…ĺun…ôman. sumamad idaw ku ńßun ¶…ôn ńßananaj a r~…ĺisi nipitad…ôman. mapataj satu ku tad…ômaw, itidan nuńß…ôni ku kidu i buńßaŇč pakunida ńßan mir~…ĺańßur~…ĺ, katukuńß tu tur~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan tajda ku tatajnaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan misapud tu ukak mibanaw misur~…ĺa ¶ kja tad…ôm ńßan tu. tawjaaj idaw ku ¶unkuo nutipanaj a ŇčajŇčajan nu tad…ômaw anipisapud…ôn ku ukak mitad…ôm, tidaaj a tad…ômaw paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " mibanaw tu ukak" anipitad…ôm ńßan, idaw ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ ajdaaj nu dipun nipatu ¶…ôkan, idaw ku tatuduńßan tu tad…ômaw i ukinawa r~…ĺap…ôs…ôn tu, nutaw a subar~…ĺan idaw ńß…ônaj ku tad…ôm…ôn ku ukakaj, nai Ē~ ° tu ku ńßun ¶…ôn ńßananaj ¶aaj tu kaadińß mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu. .
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Liwkiw binacadan (Liwkiw a kamu:Liwkiw binacadan/„Éę„Éľ„ÉĀ„É•„Éľ „Éü„É≥„āļ„āĮ RŇęchŇę minzuku?ÔľõDipun:Liwkiw binacadanÔľŹ„āä„āÖ„ĀÜ„Āć„āÖ„ĀÜ„ĀŅ„āď„Āě„ĀŹ RyŇękyŇę minzoku?)u Liwkiw subal a binacadan, sakacaay kanikalecadan nu kaudipan a kitidaan "Ukinawa, Sindaw subalan atu Yinmin subalan" nika kenih han, pala Ukinawa a tademaw han, Sindaw a tademaw atu Yinmin a tademaw, nu aydaay nu Dipun tu satabakiay a binacadan, ihakalay a tademaw saan tu Ukinawa ku nuheni han RŇęchŇę minzuku?Ôľõśó•Ť™ě:ÁźČÁźÉśįĎśóŹÔľŹ„āä„āÖ„ĀÜ„Āć„āÖ„ĀÜ„ĀŅ„āď„Āě„ĀŹ RyŇękyŇę minzoku?) . Liwkiw cundaw naw misitekeday a kanatal, kanen nu Dipun sisa mala Dipun ku nuheni, nu micidek tu nilecuhan nida a tademaw "Ukinawa a tademaw", " Sindaw a tademaw", "yenmin a tademaw", itini i imiyan caay kaw malecaday ku idang atu lalangawan nu cudad a "Liwkiw binacadan" , u cacay han musakamu tu kitidaan, duma han musakamu tu lalangawan, caay kaw malecaday kina tusaay. sisa, ayda ni kinsaan nu Dipun sa, inaya ku "Liwkiw a tademaw" atu " Liwkiw binacadan " nipipulungan amisausi, pulung han amisausi u Dipun a binacadan, duma satu, i Ukinawaay a Dipung yadah ku tidaay, muenengay i tidaay a tademaw caay kaw nakamuwan u "Liwkiw a tademaw" atu " Liwkiw a binacadan", sisa, aydaay a kawaw nai' ku tada malucekay atu misausi. ś≠§Ś§Ė, . itini likisi nakamuwan a Liwkiw binacadah tatengaay nika kenihan itini i Liwkiw cundaw (pulung nu aydaay a Ukinawa atu Luedaw nu Yenmin cundaw), idaw ku muenengay i Dipu a maudip, Taywan cundaw atu i nutawan a kanatalan mueneng. . Liwkiw binacadan tada kamu u Liwkiw a nakamuan, ayda nu Liwkiw a binacadan maliyuh tu musakamu tunu Liwki a kamuan, ayda kapulungan musakamu han u Dipun a kamuan atu Ukinawa nu Dipun a nakamuan. Liwkiw a tademaw u caaya kaww masasengiay nu nakamuan, pasu Yemin a kamu, Ukinawa a kamu, aydaay a Kuyzen a kamu, Pacun-san a kamu, Kunku a kamu, atu Nakuo a kamu. . papulung han u Liwkiw a kumuan han, milecad tu Dipun a kamuan. . Liwkiw a kamu maca cinglaw henay ayda, situngusa a misulitay san u Aetay a nakamuan, pasilusi patideng tu "Dipun a kamuan" pulung han, nika mikinkiway tina kamuan a tademaw idaw ku sasakamuen nuheni, saan Liwkiw a kamu atu Nandaw a kamu misengi micapi tu nakamuan nuheni. . yadah ku na kamuan nu Liwkiw, u Ukinawa ku tatelungan nu malucekay a kamuan, nakamuan nuheni idaw ku caaya pilecad nu nakamuan, saka caay kalecad nu nakamuan, a caay tu ka sasukumu ku nuheni. ayda nu Ukinawaay a tademaw anu u kapulunga a kitidaan u tada Dipun ku kamu nuhani, Ukinawaay a tademaw yu masasakamu satu pihaceng ku ngalngal nu Ukinawaay a musakamu tu nu Dipun a kamuan " Ukinawa kamu" ayda musakamuay tu Ukinawa a nakamuan makaala tu malebu ku matinengay musakamu, u babalakisa ku matinengay, sisa hamaw sa a malawpes kina kamu nu Ukinawa, tada musakamuay nu Pacunsayi atu Nakuoyi micidek ku adidai nu matinengay mu sakamu, ka balihenawan sa alaw a kalawpesan kina kamuan Liwkiw cundaw i laad nu Cunkuo talu atu Dipun, Liwkiw kalalidan nu Cunkuo lalangawan atu Dipun a lalangawan, mala micidekay nu lalangawan. . picidekan nu Liwkiw a lalangaw ÁźČÁźÉÁČĻśúČÁöĄśĖáŚĆĖ lunem nu Liwkiw a tademaw ÁźČÁźÉšļļÁöĄťĺúÁĒ≤ŚĘď itini i Liwkiw yadah ku milecaday tu Cuokuw atu Dipun a lalangawan. sakamusa, pikanan nu picidekan nu Liwkiw a "Ukinawa a liwli" sa, atu epahepahan nipipacikahan nu kakanen, itini i Cuokuo atu Dipun inai'. lunem nu Ukinawa mailay tu tulu nu mahicaay anitademan nu waywayan, u bilangaay a luneman, puohun a luneman atu masalumaay a luneman. lunem nu masa bilangaaay ka picidekan han i Cunkuo nutipan a Ce'-cin, Hu-cin, Kuen-tun, Puohu lunem han nu picidekan a lineman. itini i kitakid satabakiay nu Liwkiw wanciw a Puohun luneman. sumamad idaw ku huncen hananay a lisi nipitademan. mapatay satu ku tademaw, itidan nuheni ku kidu i buhang pakunida han milahul, katukuh tu tuluay a mihcaan tayda ku tataynaan a lalumaan misapud tu ukak mibanaw misulac kya tadem han tu. tawyaay idaw ku Cunkuo nutipanay a ngayngayan nu tademaw anipisapuden ku ukak mitadem, tidaay a tademaw pangangan han tu " mibanaw tu ukak" anipitadem han, idaw ku hulic aydaay nu Dipun nipatucekan, idaw ku tatuduhan tu tademaw i Ukinawa lapesen tu, nutaw a subalan idaw henay ku tademen ku ukakay, nai' tu ku huncen hananay caay tu kaadih malawpes tu. .

imijan ¶aaj kaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ku idaŇč atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu ¶udad a "r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan" , u ¶a ¶aj ńßan musakamu tu kitidaan, duma ńßan musakamu tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, ¶aaj kaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj kina tusaaj. sisa, ajda ni kinsaan nu dipun sa, inaja ku "r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw" atu " r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan " nipipur~…ĺuŇčan amisausi, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan amisausi u dipun a bina ¶adan, duma satu, i ukinawaaj a dipuŇč jadańß ku tidaaj, mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i tidaaj a tad…ômaw ¶aaj kaw nakamuwan u "r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw" atu " r~…ĺiwkiw a bina ¶adan", sisa, ajdaaj a kawaw nai Ē~ ° ku tada mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj atu misausi. **, . itini r~…ĺikisi nakamuwan a r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adańß tat…ôŇčaaj nika k…ônińßan itini i r~…ĺiwkiw ¶undaw (pur~…ĺuŇč nu ajdaaj a ukinawa atu r~…ĺu…ôdaw nu j…ônmin ¶undaw), idaw ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i dipu a maudip, tajwan ¶undaw atu i nutawan a kanatar~…ĺan mu…ôn…ôŇč. . r~…ĺiwkiw bina ¶adan tada kamu u r~…ĺiwkiw a nakamuan, ajda nu r~…ĺiwkiw a bina ¶adan mar~…ĺijuńß tu musakamu tunu r~…ĺiwki a kamuan, ajda kapur~…ĺuŇčan musakamu ńßan u dipun a kamuan atu ukinawa nu dipun a nakamuan. r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw u ¶aaja kaww masas…ôŇčiaj nu nakamuan, pasu j…ômin a kamu, ukinawa a kamu, ajdaaj a kujz…ôn a kamu, pa ¶un-san a kamu, kunku a kamu, atu nakuo a kamu. . papur~…ĺuŇč ńßan u r~…ĺiwkiw a kumuan ńßan, mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu dipun a kamuan. . r~…ĺiwkiw a kamu ma ¶a ¶iŇčr~…ĺaw ńß…ônaj ajda, situŇčusa a misur~…ĺitaj san u a…ôtaj a nakamuan, pasir~…ĺusi patid…ôŇč tu "dipun a kamuan" pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan, nika mikinkiwaj tina kamuan a tad…ômaw idaw ku sasakamu…ôn nuńß…ôni, saan r~…ĺiwkiw a kamu atu nandaw a kamu mis…ôŇči mi ¶api tu nakamuan nuńß…ôni. . jadańß ku na kamuan nu r~…ĺiwkiw, u ukinawa ku tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj a kamuan, nakamuan nuńß…ôni idaw ku ¶aaja pir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu nakamuan, saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu nakamuan, a ¶aaj tu ka sasukumu ku nuńß…ôni. ajda nu ukinawaaj a tad…ômaw anu u kapur~…ĺuŇča a kitidaan u tada dipun ku kamu nuńßani, ukinawaaj a tad…ômaw ju masasakamu satu pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ nu ukinawaaj a musakamu tu nu dipun a kamuan " ukinawa kamu" ajda musakamuaj tu ukinawa a nakamuan makaar~…ĺa tu mar~…ĺ…ôbu ku matin…ôŇčaj musakamu, u babar~…ĺakisa ku matin…ôŇčaj, sisa ńßamaw sa a mar~…ĺawp…ôs kina kamu nu ukinawa, tada musakamuaj nu pa ¶unsaji atu nakuoji mi ¶id…ôk ku adidai nu matin…ôŇčaj mu sakamu, ka bar~…ĺińß…ônawan sa ar~…ĺaw a kar~…ĺawp…ôsan kina kamuan r~…ĺiwkiw ¶undaw i r~…ĺaad nu ¶unkuo tar~…ĺu atu dipun, r~…ĺiwkiw kar~…ĺar~…ĺidan nu ¶unkuo r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu dipun a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, mar~…ĺa mi ¶id…ôkaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. . pi ¶id…ôkan nu r~…ĺiwkiw a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw ******* r~…ĺun…ôm nu r~…ĺiwkiw a tad…ômaw ******* itini i r~…ĺiwkiw jadańß ku mir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu ¶uokuw atu dipun a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. sakamusa, pikanan nu pi ¶id…ôkan nu r~…ĺiwkiw a "ukinawa a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺi" sa, atu …ôpańß…ôpańßan nipipa ¶ikańßan nu kakan…ôn, itini i ¶uokuo atu dipun inai Ē~ °. r~…ĺun…ôm nu ukinawa mair~…ĺaj tu tur~…ĺu nu mańßi ¶aaj anitad…ôman nu wajwajan, u bir~…ĺaŇčaaj a r~…ĺun…ôman, puońßun a r~…ĺun…ôman atu masar~…ĺumaaj a r~…ĺun…ôman. r~…ĺun…ôm nu masa bir~…ĺaŇčaaaj ka pi ¶id…ôkan ńßan i ¶unkuo nutipan a ¶…ô Ē~ °- ¶in, ńßu- ¶in, ku…ôn-tun, puońßu r~…ĺun…ôm ńßan nu pi ¶id…ôkan a r~…ĺin…ôman. itini i kitakid satabakiaj nu r~…ĺiwkiw wan ¶iw a puońßun r~…ĺun…ôman. sumamad idaw ku ńßun ¶…ôn ńßananaj a r~…ĺisi nipitad…ôman. mapataj satu ku tad…ômaw, itidan nuńß…ôni ku kidu i buńßaŇč pakunida ńßan mir~…ĺańßur~…ĺ, katukuńß tu tur~…ĺuaj a mińß ¶aan tajda ku tatajnaan a r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan misapud tu ukak mibanaw misur~…ĺa ¶ kja tad…ôm ńßan tu. tawjaaj idaw ku ¶unkuo nutipanaj a ŇčajŇčajan nu tad…ômaw anipisapud…ôn ku ukak mitad…ôm, tidaaj a tad…ômaw paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu " mibanaw tu ukak" anipitad…ôm ńßan, idaw ku ńßur~…ĺi ¶ ajdaaj nu dipun nipatu ¶…ôkan, idaw ku tatuduńßan tu tad…ômaw i ukinawa r~…ĺap…ôs…ôn tu, nutaw a subar~…ĺan idaw ńß…ônaj ku tad…ôm…ôn ku ukakaj, nai Ē~ ° tu ku ńßun ¶…ôn ńßananaj ¶aaj tu kaadińß mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu. .
